name: @beamhop/acp-p2p
description: Peer-to-peer transport for ACP coding-agent sessions over trystero WebRTC rooms. `/peer` is the browser SDK; `/host` runs the agent on a host process. Strategy-agnostic — bring your own joinRoom.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/peer.ts --outdir ./dist --target browser --format esm --sourcemap --external '@beamhop/acp-protocol' --external '@beamhop/acp-client' --external '@trystero-p2p/core' && bun build ./src/host.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm --sourcemap --external '@beamhop/acp-protocol' --external '@beamhop/acp-server' --external '@trystero-p2p/core' && bun build ./src/host.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format cjs --sourcemap --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].cjs' --external '@beamhop/acp-protocol' --external '@beamhop/acp-server' --external '@trystero-p2p/core' && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
